name: Auto MOT Centre Ltd
description: DVSA-authorised independent garage in Manor Park, London, offering MOT testing, full and interim car servicing, diagnostics, oil changes, and general repairs for all makes and models.

skills.name: Book an MOT Test
skills.description: Schedule a Class 4 MOT test online. Tests start from £40 and are typically completed in approximately 45 minutes. A free retest is offered within 10 working days.
examples: Book an MOT for my car
I need an MOT test in Manor Park
Schedule an MOT at Auto MOT Centre

skills.name: Book a Car Service or Maintenance
skills.description: Schedule a Full Service (from £120), Interim Service (from £80), oil change (from £45), or any other vehicle maintenance appointment.
examples: Book a full service for my car
Schedule an interim service in East London

skills.name: Check MOT Status
skills.description: Look up the current MOT status, expiry date, and test history for any UK-registered vehicle using its registration number.
examples: Look up MOT status for registration AB12 CDE
Is my car's MOT still valid?

skills.name: Vehicle Diagnostics
skills.description: Advanced electronic fault code reading and system diagnostics for all makes and models. Includes engine, ABS, airbag, and transmission diagnostics from £30.
examples: My engine warning light is on
I need a diagnostic check in Manor Park
Read fault codes for my car

skills.name: Vehicle Repairs
skills.description: Professional repair of brakes, clutch, suspension, exhaust, steering, and all mechanical components. All work quoted transparently in advance.
examples: Get a quote for brake replacement
I need an exhaust repair in East London

skills.name: Contact the Garage
skills.description: Send a message, request a callback, or get a free vehicle estimate from the team at Auto MOT Centre.
examples: Get a free estimate for my car
Send a message to the garage
